review: There's an easy wow factor to these tacos. The corn tortillas are perfect. Flavorful, a little crunchy, but soft on the inside. The fish and shrimp are absolutely delicious. I'm from San Diego where we take pride in fish and shrimp tacos and these are just as good as what you'll find there. The rice and beans are all really good too. The salsa has a great roasted flavor and doesn't hold back on any spice. Perfect for my tastes.
